hooks.prompt: Check if Claude just finished writing or modifying code (not just answering a question or having a discussion). If code was written or modified, verify: 1) Run 'pytest -q tests/ -p no:cacheprovider' if tests directory exists and check results. If tests fail, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "Tests failed: [specific failures]. Fix these before stopping."}. If no code was modified (just a conversation), or if all checks pass, respond with {"ok": true}.

hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); import py_compile; py_compile.compile(p,doraise=True) if p.endswith('.py') else None" 2>&1 || true
